title: DAO discovery + membership via subgraph: dao_list and dao_members
notes: Read-only, zero gas. Covers the two subgraph tools no other scenario touches: dexe_read_dao_list (protocol-wide discovery) and dexe_read_dao_members (per-DAO membership). The allowlisted DAO must have at least one member (its own history in this suite guarantees that).

successCriteria.check: daoList returned a non-empty DAO array; rows have id and name
members returned a non-empty member list for the allowlisted DAO
